principle: Only official or host-public pages that identify a person, date, city and event are publishable. Generic watch, homepage, profile, FAQ, programme or topic pages are rejected.

sourceAdapters.accept: Papal travel pages and Holy See Press Office bulletins with explicit date, city and itinerary item.
sourceAdapters.reject: Generic Vatican profile pages or news indexes without an itinerary row.

sourceAdapters.accept: IAEA statements, official visits and Board of Governors pages naming Rafael Grossi with date and city.
sourceAdapters.reject: IAEA topic pages, nuclear diplomacy watch pages or institution homepages.

sourceAdapters.accept: Royal Family future engagements, Court Circular and activity pages naming a royal, date and place.
sourceAdapters.reject: Generic Royal diary index pages without a person-specific event.

blockedEventTitlePatterns: city of london finance diplomacy watch
